_comment: kinoheld IDs discovered 2026-07-07 via the cinemas(search:) GraphQL query (API capture in scraper/debug/woki_curl.txt). Every ID below was verified to return real showtimes via programByMovie. Cinemas with 'source': 'custom' need their own scraper in sources/custom.py.

cinemas.name: Kinopolis Bad Godesberg
cinemas._note: listed as 'Kinopolis Bonn' on kinoheld, Moltkestr. 7 = Bad Godesberg; their data carries no OV/OmU flags, so everything classifies as DE

cinemas.name: Bonner Kinemathek
cinemas._note: listed as 'Bonner Kinemathek - Kino in der Brotfabrik' on kinoheld

cinemas.name: Stern Lichtspiele
cinemas._note: = CineStar Bonn (Markt 8), listed as 'CineStar Bonn' on kinoheld

cinemas.name: Metropolis
cinemas._note: mostly-OV house. Not usably on kinoheld (id 974 there is an event venue) — scraped from their CineWeb site, tickets via kinotickets.express

cinemas.name: Cinedom
cinemas._note: IS on kinoheld after all — no custom scraper needed
